Uses of Package
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type

  • Packages that use com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
    Provides domain classes representing objects of the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.request
    Provides classes representing requests to the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type
    Provides enums representing data types of the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.
  • Classes in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type used by com.enovka.gemini4j.domain 
    Class Description
    AnswerStyleEnum
    Specifies the desired style for generating grounded answers from the Gemini API.
    BlockedReasonEnum
    Lists the possible reasons why a piece of content was blocked by the Gemini API's content filtering system.
    BlockReasonEnum
    Specifies the reason why a user input or prompt was blocked by the Gemini API.
    FinishReasonEnum
    Defines the possible reasons why the Gemini API model stopped generating tokens for a particular candidate response.
    HarmBlockThresholdEnum
    Defines the harm probability thresholds that determine when the Gemini API should block content based on its safety assessment.
    HarmCategoryEnum
    Represents the categories of potential harm that the Gemini API can assess in generated content.
    HarmProbabilityEnum
    Represents the probability levels that content is classified with for each harm category assessed by the Gemini API's safety system.
    ModeEnum
    Defines the execution modes for function calling in the Gemini API, dictating how the model handles function predictions within a conversation.
    OperatorEnum
    Defines the comparison operators that can be applied to key-value pairs when filtering content based on metadata in the Gemini API.
    PermissionStateEnum
    Represents the possible states of a permission within the Gemini API, indicating whether the permission is currently active and grants access or is inactive and denies access.
    StateEnum
    Defines the possible processing states of a Chunk in the Gemini API, representing the different stages of its lifecycle.
    TaskTypeEnum
    Defines the type of task for which a text embedding will be used in the Gemini API.
    TypeEnum
    Defines the supported OpenAPI data types used for specifying parameters and schemas in the Gemini API.
  • Classes in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type used by com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.request 
    Class Description
    TaskTypeEnum
    Defines the type of task for which a text embedding will be used in the Gemini API.
  • Classes in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type used by com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type 
    Class Description
    AnswerStyleEnum
    Specifies the desired style for generating grounded answers from the Gemini API.
    BlockedReasonEnum
    Lists the possible reasons why a piece of content was blocked by the Gemini API's content filtering system.
    BlockReasonEnum
    Specifies the reason why a user input or prompt was blocked by the Gemini API.
    FinishReasonEnum
    Defines the possible reasons why the Gemini API model stopped generating tokens for a particular candidate response.
    HarmBlockThresholdEnum
    Defines the harm probability thresholds that determine when the Gemini API should block content based on its safety assessment.
    HarmCategoryEnum
    Represents the categories of potential harm that the Gemini API can assess in generated content.
    HarmProbabilityEnum
    Represents the probability levels that content is classified with for each harm category assessed by the Gemini API's safety system.
    ModeEnum
    Defines the execution modes for function calling in the Gemini API, dictating how the model handles function predictions within a conversation.
    OperatorEnum
    Defines the comparison operators that can be applied to key-value pairs when filtering content based on metadata in the Gemini API.
    PermissionStateEnum
    Represents the possible states of a permission within the Gemini API, indicating whether the permission is currently active and grants access or is inactive and denies access.
    StateEnum
    Defines the possible processing states of a Chunk in the Gemini API, representing the different stages of its lifecycle.
    SupportedGenerationMethod
    Represents the supported generation methods for Gemini models, providing a standardized way to identify the different capabilities of each model.
    TaskTypeEnum
    Defines the type of task for which a text embedding will be used in the Gemini API.
    TypeEnum
    Defines the supported OpenAPI data types used for specifying parameters and schemas in the Gemini API.
  • Classes in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type used by com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder 
    Class Description
    HarmBlockThresholdEnum
    Defines the harm probability thresholds that determine when the Gemini API should block content based on its safety assessment.
    HarmCategoryEnum
    Represents the categories of potential harm that the Gemini API can assess in generated content.
    ModeEnum
    Defines the execution modes for function calling in the Gemini API, dictating how the model handles function predictions within a conversation.
    TaskTypeEnum
    Defines the type of task for which a text embedding will be used in the Gemini API.
    TypeEnum
    Defines the supported OpenAPI data types used for specifying parameters and schemas in the Gemini API.
